role_title: Head of Sales - Large Enterprise, Growth

level_signals: 5+ years of front line sales management experience
Second line management experience is a plus
Responsible for operating net revenue and activation targets
Leads team of sales professionals dispersed across US

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years of experience as a proven account executive and/or 5+ years of front line sales management experience within technology, SaaS, banking or payments spaces.
must_haves.qualifier: 10+ years as AE or 5+ years front line sales management

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience working with large enterprise clients and users.
Experience training, coaching, and scaling a high-performance sales team.
Ability to build relationships with strategic clients, industry thought leaders and alliances & channel partners.
Experience operating in an early stage, high-growth technology environment.
Ability to clearly communicate technical concepts and build great relationships with highly technical customers.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Second line management experience is a plus.
Experience in the payments or financial services space is a plus.

scope.surface: Large Service Enterprise sales team covering AMER; eastern-based book of business
scope.business_model: B2B enterprise sales, financial infrastructure platform
core_responsibilities: Recruit, mentor, develop, and lead a team of sales professionals while scaling GTM presence across AMER
Train the team in collaborative pipeline generation, consultative and solution-based selling, closing tactics, adoption of MEDDIIC, and serving as a Trust Advisor
Develop long-term vision and strategy for the team and manage day-to-day operations
Be accountable for operating net revenue and activation targets
Work cross-functionally to shape Stripe's solutions to meet client needs
Inspire, motivate and enable individual development to promote career growth of direct reports

green_flags: Clear ownership over a defined book of business (eastern US large enterprise)
MEDDIIC methodology explicitly named — signals a structured, mature sales org
Stripe is a well-known, high-credibility brand in fintech
Role spans strategic and operational responsibilities — high impact scope
red_flags: Location type not specified — unclear if remote, hybrid, or onsite
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not addressed
Team size not mentioned — unclear scope of direct vs indirect reports
Role title says 'Growth' but JD body focuses on Large Enterprise — slight branding inconsistency

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years requirements, second-line management mention, and team leadership scope)
scope.business_model (inferred from company description and team context)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed as metrics)
location.type (not stated in JD; marked unclear)
compensation.source (unknown; no comp data in JD)
ambiguities: Years requirement is stated as '10+ years as AE and/or 5+ years of front line sales management' — the and/or construction means the floor is ambiguous; seniority.years_required_min set to 5 (the lower bound for management track).

Location is not specified in the JD body. The team is described as 'eastern based' with AEs 'dispersed across the US', but it is unclear whether the Head of Sales role itself must be in a specific city or can be remote.
Role title includes 'Growth' which may refer to a business segment or team name rather than a Growth PM-style function — treated as a sales leadership role.
